title: find_parallel_text data payload
description:
Structured payload for the `find_parallel_text` tool. Primary parallel/join discovery tool — sign-trigram Jaccard, ~22% recall@15 on known eBL joins (combined N=151, 267 known siblings, validation 2026-05-14).

Each candidate carries its Jaccard similarity, intersection size, union size, AND a sample of shared trigrams. This is the Phase 2 auditable-join surface: scholars can inspect WHY a candidate matched, not just where it ranked. Provenance is `source: local`, `endpoint: local:signTrigramIndex`.

target_fingerprint_size.description: Number of unique trigrams in the target's signs fingerprint (after the ≥2-X-trigram filter).

corpus_size.description: Number of fragments scored against the target — those with ≥1 trigram after filtering.

jaccard.description: Jaccard similarity = |A ∩ B| / |A ∪ B| where A, B are the trigram sets.

intersection_size.description: Count of trigrams in BOTH target and candidate. This is the load-bearing audit field — a high Jaccard with intersection=2 means coincidence on a tiny shared vocabulary; intersection=200 means real evidence.

candidate_fingerprint_size.description: Number of unique trigrams in this candidate. Helps scholars judge whether a high score is dominated by a small candidate fingerprint.

shared_trigrams_sample.description: Up to 10 trigrams that appeared in both target and candidate. Sampled deterministically by sort order for reproducibility. The full intersection is recoverable by re-running with a larger sample cap (future tool option).
